description: 考研/四六级高频手写英文词汇库 - 用于知识库检索和词汇拓展

entries.example: They had to abandon the plan due to lack of funds.

entries.collocations: to the best of one's ability 尽其所能
entries.example: She has the ability to solve complex problems quickly.

entries.meaning: v. 吸收；吸引（注意力）；理解
entries.collocations: be absorbed in 全神贯注于
entries.example: Plants absorb nutrients from the soil.

entries.meaning: adj. 抽象的 n. 摘要
entries.collocations: in the abstract 抽象地；理论上
entries.example: The concept is too abstract for beginners to grasp.
The region is abundant in natural resources.

entries.meaning: adj. 学术的；学院的 n. 学者
entries.example: His academic achievements earned him a scholarship.

entries.collocations: accelerate the pace 加快步伐
entries.example: The government is taking measures to accelerate economic growth.

entries.meaning: n. 通道；进入权 v. 访问
entries.collocations: have access to 可以使用/进入
entries.example: Students have free access to the online library.

entries.meaning: v. 容纳；为……提供住宿；适应
entries.example: The hotel can accommodate up to 500 guests.
She asked me to accompany her to the concert.

entries.collocations: accomplish a task/goal 完成任务/目标
entries.example: It took them three years to accomplish the project.

entries.collocations: to be accurate 准确地说
entries.example: The experiment requires accurate measurements.

entries.collocations: achieve one's goal 实现目标
entries.example: Hard work is essential to achieve success.

entries.meaning: v. 承认；确认收到；感谢
entries.collocations: acknowledge one's mistake 承认错误
entries.example: He refused to acknowledge that he was wrong.

entries.collocations: acquire knowledge/skills 获取知识/技能
entries.example: It takes time to acquire a new language.
New students need time to adapt to college life.
The current measures are not adequate to solve the problem.

entries.meaning: n. 青少年 adj. 青春期的
entries.example: Adolescent mental health deserves more attention.
Being bilingual gives you an advantage in the job market.

entries.collocations: in the face of adversity 面对逆境
entries.example: She showed remarkable courage in the face of adversity.

entries.meaning: adj. 美学的；审美的 n. 美感
entries.example: The design combines functionality with aesthetic appeal.
Children need love and affection to grow up healthy.

entries.meaning: adj. 侵略性的；好斗的；积极的
entries.collocations: aggressive marketing 激进的市场策略
entries.example: The company adopted an aggressive expansion strategy.

entries.collocations: alleviate pain/poverty 减轻痛苦/贫困
entries.example: These measures are designed to alleviate traffic congestion.

entries.meaning: n. 替代方案 adj. 可替代的
entries.collocations: have no alternative but to 别无选择只好
entries.example: We need to find alternative sources of energy.

entries.meaning: adj. 模棱两可的；含糊的
entries.example: The contract contains some ambiguous clauses.

entries.meaning: adj. 有雄心的；野心勃勃的
entries.collocations: be ambitious for 渴望获得
entries.example: She is ambitious to succeed in her career.
We need to analyze the results before drawing conclusions.
Our ancestors developed remarkable farming techniques.
The donation was made by an anonymous benefactor.

entries.meaning: v. 预期；期望；预先准备
entries.collocations: anticipate doing sth 预期做某事
entries.example: We anticipate that sales will increase next quarter.

entries.collocations: it is apparent that 显然
entries.example: It soon became apparent that changes were needed.
The long walk gave me a healthy appetite.

entries.meaning: v. 欣赏；感激；理解；升值
entries.collocations: I would appreciate it if 如果……我会很感激
entries.example: I really appreciate your help with this project.

entries.meaning: v. 接近 n. 方法；途径
entries.collocations: take a new approach 采用新方法
entries.example: We need a different approach to solve this issue.
Please wear appropriate clothing for the interview.
Problems often arise when communication breaks down.

entries.meaning: adj. 人工的；人造的；虚假的
entries.example: Artificial intelligence is transforming many industries.

entries.collocations: every aspect of 各方面的
entries.example: We should consider every aspect of the problem.

entries.collocations: assemble a team 组建团队
entries.example: Workers assemble the components on the production line.

entries.collocations: assess the situation 评估形势
entries.example: Teachers assess students' progress through various tests.

entries.collocations: assign sb to do sth 指派某人做某事
entries.example: The manager assigned the task to the new employee.

entries.meaning: v. 联系；关联 n. 同事
entries.example: Smoking is associated with many health problems.
Don't assume that everyone agrees with you.

entries.collocations: create an atmosphere 创造氛围
entries.example: The restaurant has a warm and friendly atmosphere.

entries.meaning: v. 把……归因于 n. 属性
entries.example: She attributes her success to hard work and perseverance.

entries.meaning: adj. 真实的；真正的；可信的
entries.example: The restaurant serves authentic Italian cuisine.

entries.collocations: have the authority to 有权做
entries.example: Only the manager has the authority to sign contracts.

entries.collocations: make sth available 使某物可用
entries.example: The report is now available for public download.
The campaign aims to raise awareness of environmental issues.
Language barriers can make communication difficult.
Regular exercise is beneficial to both body and mind.

entries.meaning: n. 偏见；偏爱 v. 使有偏见
entries.example: The study aims to eliminate bias in the selection process.

entries.meaning: n. 预算 v. 做预算
entries.example: The project was completed on time and within budget.

entries.meaning: n. 负担；重担 v. 使负重
entries.collocations: bear the burden 承担负担
entries.example: The new policy will ease the financial burden on families.

entries.collocations: ideal candidate 理想的候选人
entries.example: The ideal candidate should have at least three years of experience.

entries.collocations: beyond one's capability 超出某人能力
entries.example: The new software extends the capability of the device.

entries.collocations: face a challenge 面临挑战
entries.example: Learning a new language is both a challenge and an opportunity.
Under no circumstances should you reveal your password.
The building collapsed during the earthquake.

entries.meaning: adj. 商业的 n. 广告
entries.example: The product was a great commercial success.

entries.collocations: make a commitment 做出承诺
entries.example: Success requires commitment and hard work.
The ability to communicate effectively is essential in business.
Nothing can compensate for the loss of a loved one.
There is fierce competition in the smartphone market.
Customers complained about the poor service.

entries.meaning: adj. 复杂的 n. 综合体
entries.example: The issue is more complex than it first appears.

entries.collocations: key component 关键组成部分
entries.example: Trust is a key component of any successful relationship.
The report provides a comprehensive analysis of the market.
I find it difficult to concentrate with all this noise.
The concept of freedom varies across cultures.

entries.collocations: draw a conclusion 得出结论
entries.example: It is too early to draw any firm conclusions.

entries.meaning: v. 进行；引导 n. 行为
entries.example: The university will conduct a survey among students.

entries.collocations: be confident about 对……有信心
entries.example: She is confident that she will pass the exam.

entries.collocations: confirm a reservation 确认预订
entries.example: Please confirm your attendance by Friday.
He suffered the consequences of his poor decisions.
Water conservation is essential in dry regions.

entries.meaning: adj. 一致的；始终如一的
entries.example: His actions are not consistent with his words.

entries.collocations: constitute a threat 构成威胁
entries.example: Women constitute the majority of the workforce in this sector.
The factory consumes a large amount of electricity.

entries.meaning: adj. 当代的；同时代的 n. 同代人
entries.example: Contemporary art often challenges traditional conventions.
Everyone should contribute to protecting the environment.

entries.meaning: adj. 有争议的；引起争论的
entries.collocations: controversial issue 有争议的问题
entries.example: The new policy has been highly controversial.

entries.collocations: at your earliest convenience 尽早
entries.example: Online shopping is convenient for busy people.
He challenged conventional wisdom with his innovative ideas.

entries.collocations: convince sb to do sth 说服某人做某事
entries.example: She convinced me to join the volunteer program.
The two companies agreed to cooperate on the project.

entries.meaning: adj. 公司的；企业的；法人的
entries.example: Corporate social responsibility is increasingly important.
The results correspond closely to our predictions.
It takes courage to stand up for what you believe in.
The company is facing its biggest crisis in decades.

entries.collocations: meet the criteria 符合标准
entries.example: What criteria are used to evaluate job applicants?

entries.collocations: cultivate a habit 培养习惯
entries.example: It is important to cultivate good reading habits from an early age.

entries.collocations: out of curiosity 出于好奇
entries.example: Children have a natural curiosity about the world.
The population of the town has been in steady decline.

entries.collocations: demonstrate an ability 展示能力
entries.example: The experiment demonstrates the principles of physics.
The economy is heavily dependent on tourism.
The Great Depression had a profound impact on global economies.
Many English words derive from Latin.

entries.meaning: adj. 绝望的；极度渴望的；孤注一掷的
entries.collocations: be desperate for 极度渴望
entries.example: The refugees were desperate for food and water.
Paris is one of the world's most popular tourist destinations.

entries.collocations: determine to do sth 决心做某事
entries.example: Age should not determine a person's ability to learn.

entries.collocations: face a dilemma 面临困境
entries.example: The government faces a dilemma between growth and the environment.

entries.collocations: diminish the importance 降低重要性
entries.example: His influence has diminished significantly in recent years.

entries.meaning: n. 纪律；学科 v. 训练
entries.example: Success in any field requires discipline and practice.
It is illegal to discriminate against employees based on age.
The two parties are trying to resolve the dispute peacefully.
It is important to distinguish between fact and opinion.
The charity distributes food to families in need.
The university has a culturally diverse student body.

entries.meaning: adj. 国内的；家庭的；驯养的
entries.example: The airline operates both domestic and international flights.

entries.collocations: dominate the market 主导市场
entries.example: The company dominates the smartphone market.

entries.meaning: adj. 戏剧性的；巨大的；引人注目的
entries.example: There has been a dramatic improvement in her health.
The material is both lightweight and durable.

entries.meaning: adj. 动态的；充满活力的 n. 动力
entries.collocations: dynamic economy 充满活力的经济
entries.example: The company is looking for dynamic and creative individuals.
This car is very economical on fuel.
The new system is more efficient than the old one.

entries.meaning: adj. 精心制作的；详尽的 v. 详细说明
entries.example: Could you elaborate on your proposal?

entries.meaning: adj. 优雅的；精美的；简洁的
entries.collocations: elegant solution 优雅的解决方案
entries.example: She wore an elegant dress to the ceremony.
The new system will eliminate the need for paperwork.

entries.meaning: v. 拥抱；欣然接受；包含
entries.example: We should embrace new technologies rather than fear them.
New details have emerged about the incident.
The school places great emphasis on creative thinking.
We may encounter unexpected problems along the way.

entries.collocations: endeavor to do sth 努力做某事
entries.example: We must endeavor to reduce our carbon footprint.

entries.collocations: enhance the quality 提高质量
entries.example: Regular exercise can enhance your overall health.
The project has enormous potential for growth.

entries.collocations: full of enthusiasm 充满热情
entries.example: Her enthusiasm for teaching is truly inspiring.

entries.collocations: protect the environment 保护环境
entries.example: We all have a responsibility to protect the environment.

entries.meaning: adj. 本质的；必要的；重要的
entries.collocations: it is essential that 必须
entries.example: Water is essential for all forms of life.

entries.collocations: establish a relationship 建立关系
entries.example: The company was established in 1995.

entries.collocations: evaluate the effectiveness 评估效果
entries.example: We need to evaluate the effectiveness of the new policy.

entries.meaning: n. 证据；迹象 v. 证明
entries.example: There is no evidence to support this claim.
The evolution of technology has transformed our daily lives.

entries.collocations: tend to exaggerate 倾向于夸大
entries.example: The media tends to exaggerate the risks involved.
Everyone, without exception, must follow the rules.
Excessive use of social media can affect mental health.

entries.meaning: adj. 独有的；排外的；高档的
entries.example: The interview gave us exclusive insights into the project.

entries.meaning: v. 展示；表现 n. 展品
entries.collocations: exhibit a tendency 表现出倾向
entries.example: The patient began to exhibit symptoms of improvement.

entries.collocations: expand into new markets 拓展新市场
entries.example: The company plans to expand its operations overseas.
Her expertise in data analysis is highly valued.
We should exploit renewable energy sources.
External factors such as the economy can affect business performance.

entries.meaning: adj. 非凡的；特别的；惊人的
entries.example: She has shown extraordinary courage throughout her illness.
Modern technology facilitates global communication.

entries.meaning: adj. 灵活的；弹性的；柔韧的
entries.collocations: flexible working hours 弹性工作时间
entries.example: The company offers flexible working arrangements.

entries.meaning: v. 繁荣；兴旺；茁壮成长
entries.collocations: flourish in 在……中茁壮成长
entries.example: Small businesses have flourished in this area.

entries.collocations: lay the foundation 奠定基础
entries.example: A good education lays the foundation for future success.
The new policy caused friction between departments.

entries.meaning: adj. 基本的；根本的 n. 基础
entries.example: Freedom of speech is a fundamental human right.
The project is expected to generate significant revenue.
She showed genuine interest in the project.

entries.collocations: come with a guarantee 附带保证
entries.example: Hard work does not always guarantee success.

entries.meaning: v. 强调；突出 n. 最精彩的部分
entries.collocations: highlight the importance 强调重要性
entries.example: The report highlights the need for urgent action.

entries.collocations: test a hypothesis 验证假设
entries.example: The scientist designed an experiment to test her hypothesis.

entries.meaning: adj. 完全相同的；同一的
entries.example: The two samples are almost identical in composition.

entries.collocations: to illustrate this point 为说明这一点
entries.example: Let me illustrate this point with an example.

entries.collocations: implement a plan 执行计划
entries.example: The government plans to implement new environmental regulations.

entries.meaning: n. 含义；暗示；可能的影响
entries.example: The decision has far-reaching implications for the industry.
The government may impose higher taxes on luxury goods.
Tax incentives encourage companies to invest in research.
We should incorporate feedback from users into the design.
Recent studies indicate that exercise improves mental health.

entries.meaning: adj. 不可避免的；必然发生的
entries.collocations: it is inevitable that 不可避免的是
entries.example: Change is an inevitable part of life.

entries.meaning: n. 基础设施；基础建设
entries.collocations: transport infrastructure 交通基础设施
entries.example: Investment in infrastructure is crucial for economic development.
The company is known for its innovative products.

entries.collocations: gain an insight into 深入了解
entries.example: The research provides valuable insights into consumer behavior.

entries.meaning: v. 整合；融合；使一体化
entries.example: Technology should be integrated into the curriculum.

entries.meaning: adj. 智力的；知识的 n. 知识分子
entries.example: Reading stimulates intellectual development.
Social media has changed the way we interact with each other.
The data can be interpreted in several ways.
The matter is currently under investigation.
The problem cannot be considered in isolation.

entries.collocations: justify one's actions 为行为辩护
entries.example: How can you justify such an expensive purchase?
The government has introduced new legislation on data protection.

entries.meaning: v. 保持；维持；维修；坚持
entries.collocations: maintain good relations 维持良好关系
entries.example: It is important to maintain a healthy lifestyle.

entries.meaning: v. 显示；表明 adj. 明显的
entries.example: The disease manifests itself in various symptoms.

entries.meaning: n. 机制；机械装置；方法
entries.example: The body has a natural defense mechanism against disease.

entries.collocations: motivate sb to do sth 激励某人做某事
entries.example: Good teachers know how to motivate their students.
The union is negotiating with management over pay.

entries.meaning: adv. 然而；不过；尽管如此
entries.collocations: but nevertheless 但是尽管如此
entries.example: It was raining; nevertheless, we went for a walk.

entries.meaning: n. 目标 adj. 客观的
entries.collocations: achieve an objective 实现目标
entries.example: It's hard to be completely objective about your own work.

entries.collocations: overcome an obstacle 克服障碍
entries.example: Lack of funding is the main obstacle to the project.

entries.collocations: seize an opportunity 抓住机会
entries.example: Never miss an opportunity to learn something new.
All students are encouraged to participate in class discussions.

entries.collocations: from a different perspective 从不同角度
entries.example: Traveling gives you a new perspective on life.
Globalization is a complex phenomenon with both benefits and drawbacks.

entries.meaning: n. 潜力 adj. 潜在的
entries.collocations: reach one's full potential 充分发挥潜力
entries.example: The technology has the potential to revolutionize healthcare.

entries.meaning: n. 偏见 v. 使产生偏见
entries.example: We need to overcome prejudice and embrace diversity.

entries.meaning: n. 特权；荣幸 v. 给予特权
entries.collocations: it is a privilege to 很荣幸做
entries.example: Education should be a right, not a privilege.

entries.meaning: adj. 深刻的；深远的；渊博的
entries.example: The experience had a profound effect on her worldview.

entries.collocations: in proportion to 与……成比例
entries.example: A large proportion of the budget is spent on education.

entries.collocations: pursue a career 从事某职业
entries.example: She decided to pursue a career in medicine.
We need to make a rational decision based on the facts.
I highly recommend this book to anyone interested in history.
Your experience is highly relevant to the position.
We need a reliable method to measure the results.

entries.collocations: be reluctant to do 不愿做
entries.example: Many people are reluctant to change their habits.

entries.collocations: represent a threat 构成威胁
entries.example: The blue on the flag represents peace and unity.

entries.meaning: n. 决心；分辨率；解决方案
entries.collocations: New Year's resolution 新年决心
entries.example: She made a resolution to exercise more regularly.
We need to use our resources more efficiently.
The new restrictions on travel have affected tourism.

entries.collocations: reveal the truth 揭示真相
entries.example: The investigation revealed serious flaws in the system.

entries.meaning: n. 革命；巨大变革；旋转
entries.example: The internet has caused a revolution in communication.

entries.collocations: make a sacrifice 做出牺牲
entries.example: Parents often make sacrifices for their children's education.

entries.meaning: adj. 复杂的；精密的；老练的
entries.example: The equipment is highly sophisticated and expensive.
Statistics show that life expectancy is increasing.

entries.collocations: develop a strategy 制定策略
entries.example: The company needs a new marketing strategy.

entries.collocations: there is no substitute for 无可替代
entries.example: There is no substitute for hard work and dedication.
Is there sufficient evidence to support this claim?

entries.meaning: adj. 可持续的；可维持的
entries.example: We need to find sustainable solutions to environmental problems.
Fever is a common symptom of infection.
This is only a temporary arrangement until we find a new office.
Technology has transformed the way we work and live.

entries.meaning: adj. 巨大的；极大的；了不起的
entries.example: She has made tremendous progress in her studies.
Ultimately, the decision rests with the board of directors.
The building is undergoing major renovations.

entries.collocations: undertake a task 承担任务
entries.example: The company has undertaken to reduce its carbon emissions.

entries.meaning: adj. 独特的；独一无二的
entries.example: Each person has their own unique set of skills.
We should utilize all available resources to solve this problem.

entries.meaning: adj. 有效的；合理的；合法的
entries.collocations: valid point 有道理的观点
entries.example: You need a valid passport to travel abroad.

entries.collocations: verify the information 核实信息
entries.example: Please verify your email address before proceeding.

entries.meaning: adj. 脆弱的；易受伤的；易受攻击的
entries.collocations: be vulnerable to 易受……伤害
entries.example: Children are particularly vulnerable to online dangers.
There is widespread concern about climate change.
